race.description: ANZAC DAY RACEDAY THIS SATURDAY BENCHMARK 68 HCP
race.comment: The well-related GALWAY FLYER (6) (half to G2 winner Kirwan's Lane) grows a leg for hoop Thornton who has two wins and a placing from just three steers and will be high on confidence following that last-start win over this track and trip. Sure to be right there when the judge calls a halt. ADDITION (9) is a consistent conveyance who has hit the top-five in eight of her past nine starts and gets the reliable Gollan/Jones combination. Will run her usual honest race. FASHIONABLE (10) will be cherry-ripe now third run back from the break and gets in well at the weights with the 2kg claim. Top-three credentials. JUNE (2) boasts a win over this staying journey and maps nicely for this from gate three. Capable of featuring in the finish. WEONA REDWOOD (3) rounds out the selections in a race with only a handful of chances.
